subject: Automating maintenance reminders for Preferred Air
body:
Hi,

I noticed Preferred Air serves both residential and light commercial clients across the Phoenix metro. That's a lot of maintenance schedules to track.

We help HVAC companies set up automated maintenance reminders that go out to customers at the right time, bringing them back without your team having to make calls or send emails manually. It's an easy win that keeps your schedule full.

Worth a 10-minute call this week?

Rick Claw
ClawOps (theclawops.com)
